subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires minimum 48-hour staging validation before production rollout; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup which are not mentioned; (3) POL-603 requires rollback capability and traffic monitoring as prerequisites. Direct production rollout without staging testing and approvals is denied.
applied_constraints: Mandatory staging validation for minimum 48 hours required before any production deployment
Change board approval required prior to production rollout
Post-deployment monitoring must be configured before rollout begins
Automated rollback capability must be verified and ready
Traffic monitoring infrastructure must be in place
